actions.script:
def logValue = ec.entity.makeValue('moqui.agent.AgentToolExecutionElasticLog') logValue.setSequencedIdPrimary() agentToolExecutionElasticLogId = logValue.getPrimaryKeys().values().first() logValue.setAll([ agentToolExecutionElasticLogId : agentToolExecutionElasticLogId, agentToolExecutionLogId : agentToolExecutionLogId, logDate : logDate ?: ec.user.nowTimestamp, userId : userId ?: ec.user.userId, visitId : visitId ?: ec.user.visitId, mcpSessionId : mcpSessionId ?: visitId ?: ec.user.visitId, moquiTxId : moquiTxId, toolName : toolName, documentId : documentId, documentKind : documentKind, area : area, subArea : subArea, domainObject : domainObject, actionKind : actionKind, operationEffect : operationEffect, executionChannel : executionChannel, artifactTypeEnumId : artifactTypeEnumId, artifactName : artifactName, serviceName : serviceName, riskLevelEnumId : riskLevelEnumId, confirmed : Boolean.TRUE.equals(confirmed) ? 'Y' : 'N', success : Boolean.TRUE.equals(success) ? 'Y' : 'N', errorType : errorType, errorMessage : errorMessage, runningTimeMillis : runningTimeMillis, resultStatus : resultStatus, parameterSummary : parameterSummary, resultSummary : resultSummary, searchMode : searchMode, resultCount : resultCount, topDocumentId : topDocumentId, topScore : topScore, indexName : indexName, indexRunId : indexRunId, rerankerProvider : rerankerProvider, rerankerModel : rerankerModel, rerankerMode : rerankerMode, rerankerCandidateCount : rerankerCandidateCount, rerankerSelectedDocumentId : rerankerSelectedDocumentId, rerankerReasonCode : rerankerReasonCode, rerankerConfidence : rerankerConfidence, rerankerLatencyMillis : rerankerLatencyMillis, rerankerFallbackUsed : rerankerFallbackUsed, llmMathModelId : llmMathModelId, embeddingMathModelId : embeddingMathModelId, rerankerMathModelId : rerankerMathModelId, mathModelRunId : mathModelRunId ]) logValue.create()
try { ec.service.sync().name('org.moqui.agent.AgentTelemetryServices.count#AgentToolExecutionBin') .disableAuthz() .parameters([ logDate : logDate ?: ec.user.nowTimestamp, toolName : toolName, documentKind : documentKind, area : area, subArea : subArea, domainObject : domainObject, actionKind : actionKind, operationEffect : operationEffect, executionChannel : executionChannel, serviceName : serviceName, searchMode : searchMode, indexName : indexName, riskLevelEnumId : riskLevelEnumId, confirmed : confirmed, success : success, resultStatus : resultStatus, runningTimeMillis : runningTimeMillis, rerankerFallbackUsed : rerankerFallbackUsed ]).call() } catch (Throwable t) { ec.logger.warn("Unable to update AgentToolExecutionBin for ${toolName}: ${t.message}") }
